channel.title: Cointelegraph.com News
channel.description: Cointelegraph covers fintech, blockchain and Bitcoin bringing you the latest crypto news and analyses on the future of money.

image.title: Cointelegraph.com News
image.description: Cointelegraph covers fintech, blockchain and Bitcoin bringing you the latest crypto news and analyses on the future of money.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Cointelegraph

item.title: ETH futures flash bearish signal, but stakers’ resilience points to underlying strength
item.description: Demand for ETH leverage remains low, but corporate accumulation and stakers’ dedication may prevent an Ether price crash to $1,500.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Marcel Pechman

item.title: Anthropic suspends access to Fable 5, Mythos 5, citing US directive
item.description: Anthropic has abruptly disabled its flagship AI models after a US government directive citing national security concerns.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Cointelegraph

item.title: Major crypto exchanges cancel SpaceX IPO allocations, promising refunds
item.description: Elon Musk’s SpaceX completed its landmark IPO on the Nasdaq on Friday, but crypto users seeking tokenized exposure to the IPO were left empty-handed after allocations fell through.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Cointelegraph

item.title: Bitcoin’s ‘calm top’ challenges most market bottom estimates: Research
item.description: New data from Galaxy Research suggests that Bitcoin's floor price may not drop as low as previous bear markets, but the bottom-finding process is still playing out.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Biraajmaan Tamuly

item.title: Bitcoin rally to $70K builds as orderbook structure highlights traders’ confidence
item.description: A positive bid-ask readings and a bullish RSI divergence support Bitcoin's recovery, with $70,000 emerging as a key target.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Biraajmaan Tamuly

item.title: Sam Bankman-Fried loses appeal to overturn 25-year prison sentence
item.description: A federal appeals court upheld the former FTX chief’s conviction, while his bid for clemency from President Donald Trump appears to face steep political odds.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Sam Bourgi

item.title: Bitcoin surfs SpaceX IPO at $64K as trader warns key BTC price support may crumble
item.description: Bitcoin hit $64,000 as SpaceX launched a record-breaking IPO and US-Iran peace deal hopes continued to grow, but doubts over BTC price support remained.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by William Suberg

item.title: Crypto Biz: SpaceX fuels tokenization’s next boom
item.description: Tokenized RWAs surge despite crypto volatility, Kraken launches SpaceX IPO xStocks, prediction markets outpace onchain gambling and Sam Bankman-Fried seeks a Trump pardon.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Sam Bourgi

item.title: Polish president vetoes crypto bill for third time ahead of MiCA deadline
item.description: Polish President Karol Nawrocki vetoed a bill to implement MiCA for the third time, just weeks before the end of the EU crypto framework's transitional period.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Zoltan Vardai

item.title: KuCoin has not paid $2M award tied to delisted token dispute, investor says
item.description: A Seychelles court said KuCoin can’t treat unwithdrawn tokens as “abandoned,” and awarded a Swiss investor over $2 million. He says the exchange still hasn’t paid and plans to sue again.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Christina Comben

item.title: Metaplanet to form securities arm through Siiibo acquisition
item.description: Metaplanet will acquire Siiibo Securities and rename it Metaplanet Securities as it builds out Project Nova, its Bitcoin-centric finance strategy in Japan.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Ezra Reguerra

item.title: SpaceX tokenized IPO campaign draws $557M on Binance ahead of debut
item.description: Crypto markets are becoming a new venue for pre-IPO price discovery ahead of SpaceX's highly anticipated debut today.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Zoltan Vardai

item.title: Bitcoin miner 'capitulation' comes as trader sees later 2026 bear-market bottom
item.description: Bitcoin miner metic sparked talk of "capitulation" as profit margins stayed under 5%, but the BTC price bear-market bottom remained absent.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by William Suberg

item.title: SpaceX IPO update: Whale opens $22.3M SPCX long as synthetic price hits 30% premium
item.description: SpaceX’s IPO hype may fuel a strong debut, but history shows richly valued listings often struggle after the first-day pop fades.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Yashu Gola

item.title: Crypto scammers exploit World Cup ticket demand, TRM warns
item.description: FIFA and the FBI warned of ticket scams as TRM Labs identified World Cup-themed crypto fraud operations tied to multiple wallet addresses.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Ezra Reguerra

item.title: International sting shuts down $390M crypto money-laundering ring
item.description: Eleven countries were involved in the joint operation that ended the AudiA6 crypto laundering ring and Dark2Web marketplace.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Martin Young

item.title: Blockworks acquires Messari in crypto data consolidation push
item.description: The acquisition follows leadership changes and layoffs at Messari and adds one of crypto's largest data and analytics platforms to Blockworks' growing research business.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Nate Kostar

item.title: Exodus launches tokenized stock marketplace with Ondo, adds 200-plus onchain equities
item.description: The launch comes as tokenized equities surge in popularity, with crypto exchanges and wallets racing to offer onchain access to stocks and pre-IPO companies.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Nate Kostar

item.title: SEC plan to scrap ‘Rule 611’ positive for tokenized US stocks: Galaxy
item.description: Galaxy’s Alex Thorn says a plan to scrap rules on stock orders and quotes would remove a major barrier to tokenized stocks trading on decentralized platforms.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Jesse Coghlan

item.title: LG, Arbitrum launch blockchain-based bid in $679B ad market
item.description: LG is building a blockchain focused on buying and selling ads, joining a wave of companies launching their own blockchains in recent years.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Felix Ng

item.title: Coinbase launches tool letting AI agents make payments and trade crypto
item.description: Coinbase for Agents will allow users of the crypto exchange to manage their holdings without "constant manual oversight,” autonomously performing a range of tasks.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Jesse Coghlan

item.title: Avalanche Treasury falls 16% as it debuts on Nasdaq
item.description: Avalanche Treasury holds about 15 million of the blockchain’s native token, AVAX, which is trading at a five-year low.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Martin Young

item.title: Big Tech crash, oil volatility rattles markets: Will Bitcoin hold above $60K?
item.description: With $1.9 billion exiting the spot Bitcoin ETFs and tech stocks under pressure, BTC is failing as a hedge and at risk of falling below the $60,000 support.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Marcel Pechman

item.title: Citi launches blockchain marketplace for shares of private companies: Report
item.description: The US banking giant's blockchain marketplace will offer tokenized depositary receipts of private company shares amid Wall Street's broad embrace of tokenized assets.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Sam Bourgi

item.title: ETH futures traders lean into $1.6K range lows: Will Ether lead market recovery?
item.description: ETH traders increased their long positions as Ether price traded near 2026 lows. Will ETH’s rebound eclipse the BTC recovery?
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Biraajmaan Tamuly

item.title: Three signs that XRP price risks falling below $1 in June
item.description: XRP is forming head-and-shoulders and bear flag setups on its shorter-timeframe chart, both indicating a dip below $1 in the coming days.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Yashu Gola

item.title: Coinbase eyes World Cup boost as prediction markets surge: Bernstein
item.description: Bernstein says the 2026 FIFA World Cup could inject billions into prediction markets, with Coinbase and Robinhood positioned to capture a wave of new users.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Sam Bourgi

item.title: MassPay taps Coinbase to expand stablecoin payouts
item.description: MassPay taps Coinbase to add USDC-powered cross-border payouts, betting stablecoin rails will cut costs and speed up settlement for businesses paying globally.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Christina Comben

item.title: Franklin Templeton, BNP Paribas see tokenization boosting EU's capital efficiency
item.description: Executives from Franklin Templeton and BNP Paribas say tokenized assets and stablecoins could improve capital efficiency across Europe as Wall Street expands tokenization efforts.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Zoltan Vardai
